query:
-- Distribuição por tenant em inventory
SELECT i.tenantId, t.name AS tenant_nome, COUNT(*) AS registros,
       SUM(i.quantity) AS estoque_total, SUM(i.reservedQuantity) AS reservado_total
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = i.tenantId
GROUP BY i.tenantId, t.name
ORDER BY i.tenantId;

-- Distribuição por tenant e tipo em inventoryMovements
SELECT im.tenantId, t.name AS tenant_nome, im.movementType, COUNT(*) AS qtd_movimentos
FROM inventoryMovements im
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = im.tenantId
GROUP BY im.tenantId, t.name, im.movementType
ORDER BY im.tenantId, im.movementType;

-- Verificar se há registros em inventory onde inv.tenantId != product.tenantId (qualquer tenant)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS inconsistencias_inventory
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON p.id = i.productId
WHERE i.tenantId != p.tenantId;

-- Verificar se há registros em inventoryMovements onde mov.tenantId != product.tenantId
SELECT COUNT(*) AS inconsistencias_movements
FROM inventoryMovements im
JOIN products p ON p.id = im.productId
WHERE im.tenantId != p.tenantId;
